title: ALICE_MNEMONIC expect msg omits what value to provide
description: In cli/tests/e2e_payment.rs line 110, the expect message for ALICE_MNEMONIC says only 'must be set when ALICE_PRELOADED_DB is set'. This tells the developer nothing about what to put there. It should mirror the module-level doc description: 'ALICE_MNEMONIC must be set to the 24-word BIP-39 mnemonic matching the wallet in ALICE_PRELOADED_DB'. Without this, a developer who sets the var to something wrong (e.g. a different mnemonic) gets no hint that the wallet DB and mnemonic must be from the same derivation path.
